tasks.title: Create class library projects
tasks.description: Create 7 new class library projects under src/: Fulcrum.Core (framework abstractions + contracts), Fulcrum.News, Fulcrum.Recommendations, Fulcrum.Billing, Fulcrum.Notifications, Fulcrum.Analytics, Fulcrum.Admin. Delete auto-generated Class1.cs from each. Delete empty src/Fulcrum/ leftover directory.
steps: dotnet new classlib -n Fulcrum.Core -o src/Fulcrum.Core
dotnet new classlib -n Fulcrum.News -o src/Fulcrum.News
dotnet new classlib -n Fulcrum.Recommendations -o src/Fulcrum.Recommendations
dotnet new classlib -n Fulcrum.Billing -o src/Fulcrum.Billing
dotnet new classlib -n Fulcrum.Notifications -o src/Fulcrum.Notifications
dotnet new classlib -n Fulcrum.Analytics -o src/Fulcrum.Analytics
dotnet new classlib -n Fulcrum.Admin -o src/Fulcrum.Admin
Delete Class1.cs from all new projects
Delete empty src/Fulcrum/ leftover directory

history.note: Created 7 classlib projects, cleaned up .csproj to use Directory.Build.props, removed Auth Class1.cs, deleted empty src/Fulcrum/

tasks.title: Register projects in Fulcrum.slnx
tasks.description: Add all 7 new projects to the existing Fulcrum.slnx solution file. Verify all 9 projects are listed.
steps: dotnet sln Fulcrum.slnx add src/Fulcrum.Core/Fulcrum.Core.csproj src/Fulcrum.News/Fulcrum.News.csproj src/Fulcrum.Recommendations/Fulcrum.Recommendations.csproj src/Fulcrum.Billing/Fulcrum.Billing.csproj src/Fulcrum.Notifications/Fulcrum.Notifications.csproj src/Fulcrum.Analytics/Fulcrum.Analytics.csproj src/Fulcrum.Admin/Fulcrum.Admin.csproj
Verify with dotnet sln Fulcrum.slnx list

history.note: Added 7 new projects to Fulcrum.slnx. All 9 projects verified.

tasks.title: Wire up project references
tasks.description: Set up dependency graph: each module references Fulcrum.Core; Fulcrum.API references all modules + Core; no cross-module references.
steps: Add Fulcrum.Core reference to each module (Auth, News, Recommendations, Billing, Notifications, Analytics, Admin) using dotnet add reference
Add all module references + Core to Fulcrum.API
Verify no circular refs with dotnet build

history.note: Wired project references: 7 modules → Core, API → all 8 projects. Build succeeds 0 warnings.

tasks.title: Set up central package management
tasks.description: Create Directory.Packages.props with ManagePackageVersionsCentrally. Migrate existing package versions from individual .csproj files into central props.
steps: Create Directory.Packages.props with ManagePackageVersionsCentrally=true
Migrate Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi 10.0.5 from Fulcrum.API.csproj into central props
Remove Version= from PackageReference in Fulcrum.API.csproj
Verify dotnet build succeeds

history.note: Created Directory.Packages.props with central management. Migrated OpenApi 10.0.5. Cleaned API csproj. Build clean.

tasks.title: Clean up Fulcrum.API Program.cs
tasks.description: Remove default weather forecast boilerplate from Program.cs. Leave clean minimal host with builder, app, and Run only.
steps: Replace Program.cs content with clean minimal host (WebApplication.CreateBuilder, builder.Build, app.Run)
Remove WeatherForecast record
Verify dotnet build succeeds

history.note: Stripped weather forecast boilerplate. Clean minimal host. Build clean.

tasks.title: Add Unavailable error type to Fulcrum.Core
tasks.description: Extend ErrorType enum with Unavailable and add Error.Unavailable() factory method for rate-limit/quota/network errors needed by GNews SDK.
steps: Add Unavailable to ErrorType enum in src/Fulcrum.Core/Errors/ErrorType.cs
Add Error.Unavailable(string code, string message) factory method in src/Fulcrum.Core/Errors/Error.cs
Run dotnet build to verify

history.note: Added Unavailable to ErrorType enum and Error.Unavailable() factory method. Build clean, 0 warnings.

tasks.title: Create provider-neutral contracts in Fulcrum.News
tasks.description: Add INewsProviderClient interface and provider-neutral request/response records (TopHeadlinesRequest, SearchRequest, NewsProviderResponse, NewsProviderArticle, NewsProviderSource).
steps: Create src/Fulcrum.News/Clients/INewsProviderClient.cs with GetTopHeadlinesAsync and SearchAsync returning Result<NewsProviderResponse>
Create src/Fulcrum.News/Clients/NewsProviderContracts.cs with TopHeadlinesRequest, SearchRequest, NewsProviderResponse, NewsProviderArticle, NewsProviderSource records
Run dotnet build to verify

history.note: Created INewsProviderClient interface and 5 provider-neutral records (TopHeadlinesRequest, SearchRequest, NewsProviderResponse, NewsProviderArticle, NewsProviderSource). Build clean.

tasks.title: Implement GNews client
tasks.description: Build GNewsClient (INewsProviderClient impl), GNewsOptions (config), GNewsErrorMapper (HTTP status to Error mapping), and internal JSON deserialization types.
steps: Create src/Fulcrum.News/Clients/GNews/GNewsOptions.cs with ApiKey, BaseUrl, Timeout, SectionName

Create src/Fulcrum.News/Clients/GNews/GNewsErrorMapper.cs as internal static class mapping GNews HTTP errors (400, 401, 403, 429) to Result errors using Error.Unavailable/Validation/Unauthorized/Unexpected

Create src/Fulcrum.News/Clients/GNews/GNewsClient.cs implementing INewsProviderClient with HttpClient, query param building via QueryHelpers, JSON deserialization via System.Text.Json, provider-neutral response mapping
Add Microsoft.AspNetCore.WebUtilities package to Fulcrum.News for QueryHelpers.AddQueryString
Run dotnet build to verify

history.note: GNewsClient, GNewsOptions, GNewsErrorMapper implemented. Uses IHttpClientFactory, QueryHelpers, System.Text.Json. Added Microsoft.AspNetCore.WebUtilities + Microsoft.Extensions.Options packages. Build clean.

tasks.title: Wire DI registration and verify build
tasks.description: Add AddFulcrumNews() extension method, register GNewsClient via IHttpClientFactory, wire in Fulcrum.API Program.cs, add config to appsettings.json.
steps: Create src/Fulcrum.News/ServiceCollectionExtensions.cs with AddFulcrumNews() that configures GNewsOptions from IConfiguration, registers HttpClient<INewsProviderClient, GNewsClient>
Update src/Fulcrum.API/Program.cs to call builder.Services.AddFulcrumNews(builder.Configuration)
Add GNews config section to src/Fulcrum.API/appsettings.json with ApiKey placeholder, BaseUrl, Timeout
Run dotnet build to verify full solution builds clean

history.note: AddFulcrumNews() extension with IHttpClientFactory registration. Wired in Program.cs. GNews config section in appsettings.json. Full solution build clean, 0 warnings.
